name: Supreme Lending Dallas - Jerry Tomlinson Team
description_short: Supreme Lending Dallas offers mortgage services including conventional, VA, FHA, USDA, jumbo, and construction loans through NMLS-licensed loan officer Jerry Tomlinson.
description_long:
Supreme Lending was founded in 1999 and has established itself as a recognized mortgage company with a stated mission to put people in homes and create lifelong customer relationships. The company operates through local loan officers like Jerry Tomlinson (NMLS #188931), who serves the Dallas, Texas area from their office at 5050 Quorum Drive, Suite 500. The organization emphasizes customer service and community involvement as core differentiators in the mortgage lending space.

Supreme Lending's service portfolio spans multiple loan programs designed for different borrower profiles and property types. They offer conventional loans with down payments as low as 3%, VA loans with 100% financing for eligible military personnel, FHA loans for first-time homebuyers with lower credit requirements, USDA loans for rural properties with no money down, jumbo loans for high-value properties up to $1.5 million, condo-specific financing, and one-time close construction loans. All primary loan types offer both fixed-rate and adjustable-rate options with various repayment terms.

The company distinguishes itself through specialized service offerings including a dedicated condo loan specialist team, streamlined one-time close construction financing that combines build and purchase into a single loan, and extended construction periods with lower down payment options. They provide borrower resources including a home loan toolkit, calculator, reverse mortgage information, and buyer guidance materials. Jerry Tomlinson's team emphasizes personalized guidance and expert communication throughout the mortgage process.

As a mortgage lender, Supreme Lending is appropriately categorized and operates within the established mortgage industry. Borrowers should note that loan approval remains subject to credit, income, and property evaluation requirements, and specific terms vary by program. The company's website provides program details but prospective borrowers would need direct contact for personalized rate quotes and eligibility assessment.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers VA loans with 100% financing and no PMI for eligible military borrowers
Provides one-time close construction loans up to $1.5 million with streamlined process
FHA loans available with credit scores as low as 620 and down payments from 3.5%
USDA loans with 100% financing for eligible rural properties
Dedicated condo loan specialist team for unique financing needs
Wide range of conventional loan options with down payments from 3%
Multiple repayment term options across all loan programs
cons: Website lacks specific interest rate information; rates must be obtained through direct inquiry
Limited transparency on closing costs and fees; specific pricing not disclosed online
No online application status tracking or digital documentation system mentioned on website
best_for: Military veterans and active-duty personnel seeking VA financing
First-time homebuyers with lower credit scores using FHA programs
Rural property buyers interested in USDA 100% financing
High-net-worth buyers seeking jumbo loans or construction financing
diagnosis: Supreme Lending Dallas is best for borrowers seeking diverse loan program options including VA, FHA, USDA, and construction financing with local, personalized service from an established national lender. Primary caveat: prospective borrowers must contact Jerry Tomlinson's team directly for rate quotes, specific loan terms, and eligibility verification, as detailed pricing and approval criteria are not available online.
services: Conventional mortgage loans with fixed and adjustable rates
VA loans for veterans and active-duty military personnel
FHA loans with low down payment and credit requirements
USDA loans for rural properties with 100% financing
Jumbo loans for luxury and high-value properties
Condo-specific mortgage financing with specialist team
One-time close construction loans with extended terms
Mortgage refinancing across all program types
Home buyer resources and education materials
Loan calculators and financial planning tools
Personalized mortgage guidance and communication support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: Supreme Lending Dallas, 5050 Quorum Dr Suite 500, Dallas, TX 75254
